strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, cloud infrastructure)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, code generators, agentic workflows)
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and knowledge-sharing (GISCollective, workshops, talks)
concerns: Limited explicit AI/ML product development experience in resume (no direct mention of AI models or platforms)
No advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) in AI-related fields, despite long career in software engineering
Indirect entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) but no clear record of driving AI-driven startups or large-scale cloud AI platforms

key_factors.factor: Advanced AI/ML academic or research background
Leadership in AI strategy or cloud platform innovation

response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack engineering skills and recent AI-agent infrastructure experience, aligning with the technical requirements. However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of AI strategy leadership, advanced AI degrees, or large-scale AI product development. While entrepreneurial and open-source contributions are notable, they don't fully address the AI-specific strategic differentiation focus of the role.
